about.title: About Me
about.greeting: Hello and welcome to my page!
about.bio_1: My name is Fitly Tjong Mamuaya, an IT professional and Master of Information Systems graduate from Satya Wacana Christian University (UKSW). My main expertise lies in Graphic Design, Audit & Analysis, and Machine Learning, with a deep specialization in Computer Vision.
about.bio_2: I am experienced in developing models for prediction, forecasting, classification, object detection, and deep face analysis to read human emotions and interactions using OpenCV for various projects.
about.bio_3: I am also proficient in graphic design tools such as Photoshop, Premiere Pro, and After Effects to create logos, UI/UX, animations, and more.
about.bio_4: During my master's studies, which resulted in a Scopus Q3 journal publication on brain tumor detection (ReViXNET50) that I presented at iCAST 2025, I was trained to dissect complex problems, choose the most efficient solutions, and evaluate final results measurably.
about.bio_5: This problem-solving and adaptation ability was also honed practically through work experience as an admin and active involvement in various campus expos and activities.
about.quote: In the unknown, every challenge is a canvas. Every discovery is an upgrade.
